summary: Restructured log-entry detail pane with semantic sections, JSON tree view, and a formatted exception view.
highlights: Promoted the log message into a level-tinted hero card so severity is identifiable at a glance.
Split the entry header into discrete METADATA rows (Logger, Receiver, Thread, Host, Call site, Source) — each filterable.
Replaced the raw JSON payload dump with a collapsible tree, with syntax coloring per JSON value type.
Replaced the raw exception text with a structured view that distinguishes the exception type/message, stack frames, and inner-exception separators.
Right pane (payload + exception) now collapses when both are empty, giving the metadata pane the full width.
Empty ATTRIBUTES section is hidden instead of showing a placeholder message.
Fixed the level badge from rendering as a tall pill with off-center text and corrected the monospace font binding.
